name: Lviv Timetable MCP
description: Lviv (Ukraine) public transport MCP server — live arrivals, vehicle positions, stop discovery, route shapes, and static timetables. No API key required.

examples.name: Get Stop Realtime
examples.description: Live arrivals and vehicle positions at a stop by numeric stop ID

examples.name: Get Route Realtime
examples.description: Live vehicle positions for all vehicles currently running on a route

examples.name: Get Route Static
examples.description: Route metadata, stop lists, departure times, and polylines for map rendering

examples.name: Find Stops Around Location
examples.description: Discover stops near a given latitude/longitude

examples.name: Get Stop Geometry
examples.description: Static map context for a stop: stop marker and route polylines

configSchema.title: Lviv Timetable — connection (all optional)
configSchema.description: Public read-only API. No API key or secrets. You may pass an empty object; optional fields are client hints and may be ignored by the upstream server.

default_language.title: Preferred prompt language
default_language.description: Preferred response language: 'en' for English, 'uk' for Ukrainian, 'any' for no preference. Treated as a client hint; the server may ignore it.
